title: Put Provenance Labels on AI Research
description: How to make AI-assisted research trustworthy for a reader who can't check it: a three-tier confidence label on every number, an adversarial audit loop that re-derives claims at their sources, and the honest downgrade when a source can't be read. The technique behind demo 10.
cardDesc: Three label tiers, an adversarial re-derivation loop, and the honest downgrade — shown working.
